/*
Package demo shows comment handling.
*/
package demo

import "fmt" // standard library

// Greet prints a greeting.
// Multi-line doc comment.
func Greet(name string) {
	url := "https://golang.org/*not-a-comment*/"
	pattern := "//also-not-a-comment"
	fmt.Println("Hello,", name, url, pattern) // trailing
}
